de.meaning: Eine kleine Burg, die man aus Sand am Strand baut.

en.meaning: A small castle built from sand at the beach.
en.example: We built a big sand castle.

fact.de: Kleopatra lebte näher an der Erfindung des iPhones als am Bau der Cheops-Pyramide.
fact.en: Cleopatra lived closer in time to the iPhone than to the building of the Great Pyramid.

en.headline: What is drought and why are parts of UK close to it?
